$notes: All coordinates in inches, on a 13.333 × 7.5in canvas (1920 × 1080 logical px @ 144 dpi).
Color/font keys reference tokens.json (themes.<theme>.color.<key>, typography.family_<x>, typography.scale_pt.<key>).
`region.kind` is the python-pptx primitive: text | rect | line | image | placeholder | shape (with shape.type).
`region.binds_to` names the data slot a renderer will fill (e.g. 'title','kpi[].value'). null = decorative.

Single-theme export: only 'lore' resolves. Adding a sibling theme later only requires adding it under tokens.themes and providing assets/corner_mark_<theme>.png; layout color references are theme-agnostic.

$conventions.vrail: 0.667in wide column at left edge, full height. Default fill: bg_primary, border-right 0.014in divider_strong. Inner text: rotated -90°, font=mono, size=micro, color=text_primary, padded 1.39in from top.
$conventions.frame: 0.222in inset rectangle, 0.014in border (divider_strong), bg=bg_surface unless theme is dark.
$conventions.chrome: Top/bottom horizontal bands inside frame: 0.4in × 0.28in pad, mono micro CAPS, 0.014in border-bottom (top chrome) or border-top (bottom chrome).

01_cover.description: Cover index — large grid of section titles with eyebrow numbers, all-on-parchment.

02_title_a.description: Vertical chartreuse rail (rotated company name) + center-vertical headline on parchment.

03_title_b.description: Inverted: chartreuse field with graphite rail, parchment card 56% width on right.

04_agenda_type.description: Staggered list — agenda items as numbered display lines, indented progressively.

05_agenda_grid.description: Agenda as a 2×N card grid with eyebrow + label + description.

06_section_opener.description: Dark slide with rail + giant numeral on right.

07_speaker_intro.description: Frame with portrait left, biographical text right, footer chrome.

08_big_numbers_3up.description: Three full-height columns, each with a giant figure + caption. Column tints alternate (warm/parch/cool).

09_big_numbers_6up.description: 6-up grid of figures inside a frame; each cell has a top-left corner flag (small triangle).

10_highlights.description: Two columns of numbered list rows: highlights + lowlights.

11_updates_status.description: Frame with chromed rows: each row has Objective | Owner | Status pill | Update text.

12_objectives_2x2.description: 2x2 grid of objective cards, each with a stoplight indicator.

14_results_bars_h.description: Horizontal bar pairs (goal vs actual) with delta annotations.

15_bar_chart_v.description: Vertical bar chart with split chrome (title + subhead) and labeled axes.

17_timeline_milestones.description: Horizontal timeline with year ticks and metric callouts.

18_timeline_zigzag.description: Zigzag year blocks alternating above/below an axis.

19_matrix_2x2.description: Strategy matrix — 2x2 quadrants with axis labels and items per cell.

21_qa_display.description: Q&A — full-bleed type on tinted background.

22_poll.description: Audience poll — section tab top + centered question + 2-4 vote bars.

23_image_caption.description: Left caption column + right image (60/40 split).

24_rapid_framework.description: FigJam-style canvas with role pills (R/A/P/I/D) and arrows.

25_decision_framework.description: Two-pane canvas: left criteria list, right weighted-decision table.

29_persona.description: Persona card — bio block + traits + quotes.

30_gantt.description: Gantt chart with month columns and task rows.

32_exec_summary.description: Hero headline + KPI strip + 3 colored column cards + next-steps row.

34_closing.description: Closing slide — chartreuse-soft background, centered thank-you.

36_target_markets.description: Dark slide with 3 region cards + totals bar.

38_chart_area.description: Area chart — portfolio value over time.

40_chart_candlestick.description: Candlestick trading chart with volume strip.

41_chart_treemap.description: Treemap of holdings — variable-size tiles colored by performance.
